_meta.source: dist/index.d.ts (CodeGraph class) + dist/types.d.ts + dist/extraction/index.d.ts + dist/directory.d.ts + dist/db/index.d.ts + dist/sync/watch-policy.d.ts of the published 0.9.9 tarball
_meta.validated: Empirically exercised on darwin-arm64, Node v25.6.1 (node:sqlite available). Async flags derived from the published .d.ts return types (Promise<...> => async:true).
_meta.consumer: C1 timeout-contract (async => needs timeout wrapper), C7 writer-ownership (serve.* finding)
_meta.packaging_note: Thin installer: the runtime ships as per-platform optionalDependencies (@colbymchenry/codegraph-<platform>-<arch>@0.9.9); npm-sdk.js re-exports the host bundle's lib/dist/index.js. The programmatic API is only usable when the matching platform bundle is installed (npm ci on CI) or self-healed into ~/.codegraph.
_meta.import_note: CommonJS dynamic module.exports: ESM consumers MUST use a default import then destructure (import pkg from '@colbymchenry/codegraph'; const { CodeGraph } = pkg). Named ESM imports fail (cjs-module-lexer cannot see the dynamic re-export).

init.notes: Factory: creates .codegraph/ + db; options.index runs initial index, options.onProgress callback.

open.notes: Open existing project; options.sync re-syncs changed files, options.readOnly.

isInitialized.notes: True only when BOTH .codegraph/ and codegraph.db exist.

close.notes: Release DB + resources. SYNC — no await needed.

indexAll.notes: Full index under a mutex. IndexResult={success,filesIndexed,filesSkipped,filesErrored,nodesCreated,edgesCreated,errors[],durationMs}. Long-running => primary C1 timeout target.

indexFiles.notes: Index specific files under the index mutex.

isIndexing.notes: Whether an index op is in flight.

watch.notes: Opt-in native-event file watcher with debounced auto-sync. NOT auto-started by init/open. Returns true if started.

getPendingFiles.notes: Files seen by watcher since last sync; empty when watcher inactive.

waitUntilWatcherReady.notes: Resolves after initial watcher scan; resolves immediately when no watcher active. timeoutMs?.

getChangedFiles.notes: Filesystem-based change detection since last index.

extractFromSource.notes: Extract nodes/edges from source without storing.

resolveReferencesBatched.notes: Batched resolution to bound memory on large codebases.

getNode.notes: Node by id; null when absent (no throw).

searchNodes.notes: FTS text search. SearchResult={node:Node,score:number,highlights?:string[]}. Empty repo => []. SYNC.

getTopRouteFile.notes: Densest route-node file; null if <3 routes.

getRoutingManifest.notes: URL->handler manifest; null if <3 valid routes. limit?.

getFile.notes: File record by path; null if untracked.

getContext.notes: Containment hierarchy + children + references for a node.

traverse.notes: BFS traversal. Subgraph={nodes:Map<string,Node>,edges:Edge[],roots:string[],confidence?}. nodes is a Map.

findUsages.notes: All references to a symbol via any edge kind.

getCallers.notes: Callers of a function/method. maxDepth? default 1. SYNC — do NOT await in C1.

getCallees.notes: Callees of a function/method. maxDepth? default 1.

getImpactRadius.notes: Nodes affected by changes to a node. maxDepth? default 3. Returns Subgraph (nodes is a Map). SYNC.

findPath.notes: Shortest path between two nodes; null if none.

getFileDependents.notes: Files that depend on this file.

findCircularDependencies.notes: Cycles, each an array of file paths.

getCode.notes: Reads file + slices node's lines; null if not found. ASYNC (file I/O).

findRelevantContext.notes: Semantic search + traversal for a query. FindRelevantContextOptions.

buildContext.notes: Task context. TaskInput=string|{title,description?}. Default format 'markdown' => returns a STRING; format:'json' or object consumers get TaskContext={query,subgraph,entryPoints,codeBlocks,relatedFiles,summary,...}. ASYNC.

serve.transport: stdio JSON-RPC (MCP). Handshake initialize -> notifications/initialized -> tools/list verified.
serve.bin_resolution: exports map blocks subpath resolve; resolve via require.resolve('@colbymchenry/codegraph/package.json') then join dirname with bin.codegraph (npm-shim.js). The shim execs the per-platform bundle's own Node 24 with --liftoff-only.
serve.watcher_default: ACTIVE by default during serve --mcp (native-event watcher + debounced auto-sync; the daemon/direct server WRITES to the db on file changes).

disable_knobs.CODEGRAPH_NO_WATCH=1: Authoritative opt-out — 'explicit opt-out always wins' (dist/sync/watch-policy.d.ts). EMPIRICALLY VERIFIED to silence the serve watcher (no 'File watcher active' line; tools/list still returns).
disable_knobs.CODEGRAPH_NO_DAEMON=1: Selects direct (single-process stdio) mode instead of shared daemon. EMPIRICALLY this does NOT disable the watcher — direct mode still reports 'File watcher active'. Not a watcher kill-switch.
disable_knobs.CODEGRAPH_WATCH_DEBOUNCE_MS: Tunes (not disables) the debounce window; clamped [100ms, 60s], default 2000ms.

serve.sdk_writer_ownership_note: For C7 writer-ownership: the embedded SDK is the cleanest no-background-writer path — init()/open() do NOT auto-watch; only an explicit cg.watch() starts the background writer, and cg.unwatch() stops it. For the long-lived serve --mcp server, set CODEGRAPH_NO_WATCH=1 to guarantee no autonomous re-index writes.
